drl:
rule "R0"
salience -5
when
    T1(f0 != -2.0, $b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f2)
    $p0_1 : T1(f0 >= $b0_0_0)
    T1(f0 != $b0_0_0, $b0_2_0 : f1, $b0_2_1 : f2)
then
    delete($p0_1);
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 > "a")
    T0(f1 < -2.5, f1 == 0, $b1_1_0 : f1, $b1_1_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T1(4.0, "alpha", true));
    insert(new T1(-2.0, $p1_0.getF0(), true));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f0 != 4.0, $b2_0_0 : f0)
    $p2_1 : T1($b2_1_0 : f2, f2 == false)
then
    modify($p2_1) { setF2(true) }
end
rule "R3"
salience -3
when
    T0($b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f1)
    T0(f0 == "zz", f1 != 5.5, f1 >= $b3_0_0, $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f0)
    T1(f0 == 2)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T0(f0 > "zz", f1 == 3.0, $b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f1)
then
end
